final_prompt.prompt:
Create a presentation cover slide for the launch announcement of 长安起源 Q06.

Style/medium: needs a premium, expansive aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include large primary title centered/upper, smaller subtitle below, with translucent background imagery
Subject: must include "长安起源 Q06" as the product name, "9月上市" as the launch timing
Scene/backdrop: needs a transparent, awe-inspiring visual direction — exact imagery choice is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a premium launch atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with the 长安起源 brand identity — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a translucent, layered treatment — exact depth and opacity are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "长安起源 Q06" (title), "9月上市" (subtitle)
Constraints: must preserve the brand identity of 长安起源, must work as a PPT cover slide
Avoid:
